use_cases: Display feature highlights or new announcements in landing page hero sections
Show status badges or labels with optional icons in marketing pages
Present category or tag indicators in promotional content areas
Act as call-to-action labels with visual emphasis in hero layouts
Provide animated section markers for SaaS product marketing
ai_summary: A lightweight hero section pill component that displays feature highlights, status badges, or promotional labels with optional icons. Features slide-up animation on mount and hover state transitions, designed for use in landing pages and marketing hero sections to draw attention to key messaging or new features.
